summary: Comprehensive testing of JoliHunt landing page with JWT authentication, blog management, user management, and newsletter APIs. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for login, dashboard, blog creation, user management, and protected routes.

issues: Newsletter subscription form appears to be a 'Get Started Free' CTA rather than a dedicated newsletter signup - this is by design per user request

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hooks exhaustive-deps warnings in BlogPage.jsx and BlogPostPage.jsx - useEffect missing fetchBlogPosts/fetchPost dependencies
Minor: UNSAFE_componentWillMount warning from SideEffect(NullComponent) - likely from react-helmet or similar library
seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-seeded on backend startup. Test data created during pytest run (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: Auth (login/logout/register/session), Blog CRUD (create/read/update/delete), User Management CRUD, Newsletter subscription. Protected routes properly redirect unauthenticated users. Cookies are set correctly with httpOnly. Brute force protection implemented (5 failed attempts = 15 min lockout).

authentication.login: PASS - Admin login with cookies working
authentication.register: PASS - Creates new user with role=user
authentication.auth_me: PASS - Returns current user from cookie
authentication.protected_routes: PASS - Redirects to login when unauthenticated

admin_dashboard.stats_display: PASS - Shows blog posts, users, subscribers counts
admin_dashboard.quick_actions: PASS - Navigation to create blog, manage blogs, user management

blog_management.create: PASS - Admin can create blog posts
blog_management.list: PASS - Public can view all posts
blog_management.unauthorized_create: PASS - Returns 401 for unauthenticated, 403 for non-admin

user_management.list: PASS - Admin can view all users
user_management.delete: PASS - Admin can delete users (except self)

cors_and_cookies.httponly_cookies: PASS - access_token and refresh_token set as httpOnly
